name: 12-factor-app
title: 12-factor-app
summary: Audit and refactor apps, SaaS products, APIs, services, and CLI tools for deployability, maintainability, configuration, logging, release readiness, and product polish.
recommended_trigger_phrases: Use the 12-factor-app skill to audit this app for deployability, maintainability, configuration, logging, and release readiness.
review_protocol: Identify project type and user-facing goal.
Inspect relevant files and infer missing context conservatively.
Run available validation commands or record why they could not run.
